title: Apache HTTP Server mod_proxy_uwsgi buffer overflow
description: A buffer overflow in mod_proxy_uwsgi allows remote attackers to cause denial of service or potentially execute code.

title: Apache HTTP Server privilege escalation
description: A privilege escalation vulnerability in Apache HTTP Server allows less privileged users to execute arbitrary code.

title: Apache HTTP Server weak Digest auth nonce
description: Weak Digest auth nonce generation could allow replay attacks.

title: Apache mod_proxy_ftp SSRF
description: A server-side request forgery vulnerability in mod_proxy_ftp.

title: Apache path traversal and remote code execution
description: A path traversal flaw in Apache 2.4.49/2.4.50 allows RCE.

title: Apache path traversal and file disclosure
description: A path traversal vulnerability in Apache 2.4.49 allows remote attackers to read arbitrary files.

title: Apache HTTP Server mod_sed memory corruption
description: A memory corruption vulnerability in mod_sed could lead to denial of service.

title: Apache HTTP Server read beyond bounds
description: A read beyond bounds vulnerability in Apache HTTP Server could lead to information disclosure.

title: Apache HTTP Server mod_proxy request splitting
description: A request splitting vulnerability in mod_proxy could allow cache poisoning.

title: Apache HTTP Server mod_proxy HTTP request smuggling
description: A request smuggling vulnerability in mod_proxy allows remote code execution.

title: nginx DNS resolver off-by-one heap write
description: A vulnerability in nginx DNS resolver allows remote attackers to cause heap memory corruption.

title: nginx HTTP request smuggling
description: An HTTP request smuggling vulnerability in nginx could allow cache poisoning.

title: nginx DNS resolver memory exhaustion
description: A memory exhaustion vulnerability in the DNS resolver of nginx.

title: nginx ALPACA protocol confusion
description: A vulnerability in nginx could allow man-in-the-middle attackers to redirect traffic.

title: nginx mp4 module memory corruption
description: A memory corruption vulnerability in the ngx_http_mp4_module.

title: nginx HTTP/2 Rapid Reset attack
description: A vulnerability in HTTP/2 protocol handling allows denial of service.

title: nginx SPDY heap buffer overflow
description: A heap buffer overflow in SPDY implementation allows remote code execution.

title: nginx DNS resolver use-after-free
description: A use-after-free vulnerability in the DNS resolver.

title: nginx UDP proxy use-after-free
description: A use-after-free in the UDP proxy could allow remote code execution.

title: nginx HTTP/3 stream memory corruption
description: A memory corruption vulnerability in HTTP/3 stream handling.

title: OpenSSH observable discrepancy in authentication
description: An observable discrepancy in SSH authentication could allow user enumeration.

title: OpenSSH user enumeration
description: OpenSSH through 7.9 allows user enumeration due to different responses.

title: OpenSSH privilege escalation via sshd
description: A vulnerability in sshd allows privilege escalation on some systems.

title: OpenSSH smartcard heap overflow
description: A heap overflow in smartcard handling could allow remote code execution.

title: OpenSSH PKCS#11 heap overflow
description: A heap overflow in PKCS#11 token handling allows remote code execution.

title: OpenSSH regreSSHion vulnerability
description: A signal handler race condition allows unauthenticated remote code execution.

title: OpenSSH legacy certificate validation
description: A flaw in legacy certificate validation could allow man-in-the-middle attacks.

title: OpenSSH denial of service via SSH1
description: A denial of service vulnerability in SSH1 protocol fallback.
remediation: Disable SSH1 or upgrade to OpenSSH 6.4 or later.

title: OpenSSH user enumeration via SHA-256
description: A timing attack allows user enumeration via password hashing differences.

title: OpenSSH agent forwarding hijack
description: A vulnerability in agent forwarding could allow session hijacking.

title: MySQL Server: DML unspecified vulnerability
description: Vulnerability in the MySQL Server product allows high privileged attacker to cause denial of service.

title: MySQL Server: Optimizer unspecified vulnerability
description: Vulnerability in MySQL Server could allow high privileged attacker to cause hang or crash.

title: MySQL InnoDB vulnerability
description: Vulnerability in InnoDB could allow a high privileged attacker to cause denial of service.

title: MySQL Server: DDL unspecified vulnerability
description: A vulnerability in DDL operations could allow DoS via Oracle MySQL Server.

title: MySQL Server: Optimizer heap overflow
description: A heap overflow in the optimizer could allow unauthorized data access.

title: MySQL Server: InnoDB DoS
description: A vulnerability in InnoDB allows high privileged attacker to cause DoS.

title: MySQL geometry query memory corruption
description: A memory corruption vulnerability in geometry query parsing allows RCE.

title: MySQL C API integer overflow
description: An integer overflow in the C API could lead to client-side code execution.

title: PostgreSQL information disclosure
description: A vulnerability in PostgreSQL could allow an unprivileged user to read arbitrary files.

title: PostgreSQL SQL injection in pg_dump
description: A SQL injection vulnerability in pg_dump could allow an attacker to execute arbitrary SQL.

title: PostgreSQL memory disclosure
description: A vulnerability could allow an attacker to read arbitrary memory.

title: PostgreSQL JDBC driver RCE
description: A remote code execution vulnerability in the JDBC driver.

title: PostgreSQL schema element privilege escalation
description: A privilege escalation vulnerability allows unauthorized access to schema elements.

title: PostgreSQL TOAST index corruption
description: An index corruption vulnerability in TOAST could lead to data loss.

title: PostgreSQL search_path privilege escalation
description: A privilege escalation vulnerability via search_path manipulation.

title: PostgreSQL logical replication memory leak
description: A memory leak in logical replication could cause denial of service.

title: Apache Tomcat Information Disclosure

remediation: Upgrade to Apache Tomcat 9.0.45 or later.

description: A remote code execution vulnerability when using persistent session storage.

title: Tomcat incomplete cleanup of concurrent resources
description: Improper resource cleanup could lead to information disclosure.

description: A file inclusion vulnerability in the AJP connector allows RCE or file disclosure.

title: Tomcat HTTP request smuggling
description: An HTTP request smuggling vulnerability could allow cache poisoning.

title: Tomcat HTTP/2 stream memory leak
description: A memory leak in HTTP/2 stream handling could cause DoS.

title: Tomcat TLS handshake DoS

description: A request smuggling vulnerability in IIS could lead to cache poisoning.

description: An authentication bypass vulnerability in IIS could allow unauthorized access.

description: A memory corruption vulnerability in URL Rewrite module.

description: A directory traversal vulnerability in PHAR files could allow remote file access.

description: A buffer overflow in match_weak could allow code execution.

description: An integer overflow in mysqlnd extension could lead to heap corruption.

description: An XML external entity injection vulnerability via libxml2.

title: OpenSSL NULL pointer dereference
description: A NULL pointer dereference in OpenSSL could cause a denial of service.

title: OpenSSL infinite loop in BN_mod_sqrt()

description: A crash vulnerability in PKCS12 parsing could lead to denial of service.

description: A vulnerability in HTTP/2 protocol handling allows denial of service.

description: A memory leak in cursor handling could cause denial of service.

description: An information disclosure vulnerability in aggregation pipeline.

description: A container escape vulnerability in runc via leaked file descriptors.

description: A path traversal vulnerability in the API server.
